evaluation.summary: The LDAB empirical correction factor varies widely (mean ≈ 493, std ≈ 938) for primes up to 5 M, disproving the claim of a constant value of 1 and revealing a systematic bias.
next_directions: Analyze the correction factor for larger primorial bases and higher limits to assess generality.
Derive or refine the theoretical model of LDAB to explain the observed bias and variance.
Validate the findings with independent codebases and alternative prime generation methods.
